title: nephrodium callipteris
intro: Nephrodium callipteris, also known as the Callipteris fern, is a type of extinct fern species that belongs to the family Matonia. The plant has been found in various fossil records, particularly in the Jurassic period. Nephrodium callipteris is not known for its medicinal properties due to its extinction status. However, its extinct relatives and similar plant species have been studied for their potential health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, and may be used in herbal preparations like teas or infusions, although no specific preparations have been documented for this species.
